data.title: 国际服卡池「Santa Claus Hanae has a Chant of Blessing for Sensei!」

data.body:
[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A New Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 6/13 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Hanae (Christmas)

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 6/13 (Tue) After Maintenance – 6/27 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
